prompt: A cinematic urban street scene at golden hour featuring a young woman standing still in the center of a busy city street. She has shoulder-length slightly messy blonde hair, wearing a minimal white shirt and dark blazer. The crowd around her moves quickly, creating strong motion blur while she remains sharp and perfectly in focus. Tall buildings line both sides of the street, with buses and traffic framing the scene. Warm sunlight streams from the background, creating a glowing backlight and soft rim light around her hair. Shallow depth of field, 85mm lens look, high dynamic range, realistic skin tones, cinematic composition, emotional and introspective mood, ultra-detailed, 8K, professional photography.
